name: art-upgrade-image-surfaces
title: 需要图片位置的美术升级
description: 盘点并升级所有产品中明确需要图片的位置，尤其是正式 NPC 头像/立绘/表情差分、酒馆封面/氛围图和入口传播图片。
creator: lijin
notes: Current checked slice covers missing entry-panel avatar fallback, direct neutral assets for default public-welfare NPCs, asset existence tests, and fresh build/typecheck/pytest. Full expression variants for the 11 non-Mimi default NPCs remain an explicit P0 follow-up gap; do not claim them complete without distinct generated assets and sprite wiring.
